<findings>

[observation] [info] High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected

</findings>

<insights>

- High cohesion (1) — files are tightly interconnected
- Document the shared viewer constants and types so component authors avoid scattered definitions when adding new panels.
- Add visual regression or Storybook coverage for control-heavy components like `active-tasks-panel.ts` to keep UX stable as schemas evolve.
- Continue validating client-side inputs through `schema/validate.ts` to prevent inconsistent data before calling server APIs.
- Pure front-end zone with cohesion 1.0 and zero coupling, so enforcing the current isolation (only two imports into the runtime zone) will help maintain a thin API seam.
- [call graph] 1134 internal calls, 1 outgoing, 0 incoming (cohesion: 1, coupling: 0)

</insights>

<sub-zones>

This zone has 3 sub-zone(s):

- **Web** (`web-2/web`): 4 files, cohesion 0.4, coupling 0.6
- **Web 2** (`web-2/web-2`): 61 files, cohesion 0.91, coupling 0.09
  - Has 3 nested sub-zone(s)
- **Web 3** (`web-2/web-3`): 33 files, cohesion 0.93, coupling 0.07
